request.objectPrompt:
Uniswap Lake Props for liquidity-lake; every object should be a separate terrain-matched prop that makes the simplified region feel finished and resource-rich.
A cost-efficient batch sheet of separate static Uniswap biome and land scatter props.
Each cell is a different independent object, not a variant or animation frame.
These are natural biome objects for terrain richness: stones, bushes, reeds, moss, flowers, crystals, puddles, roots, fallen branches, and magical habitat details.
Avoid buildings, furniture, civic architecture, tools, signs, benches, tables, and town decorations.
Use the row and column map exactly.
Row 0 column 0: Paired Current Ripple - paired current ripple, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake.

image.title: Uniswap Lake Props sprite sheet
image.prompt:
Create a game object sprite sheet for Uniswap Lake Props.
Object brief: Uniswap Lake Props for liquidity-lake; every object should be a separate terrain-matched prop that makes the simplified region feel finished and resource-rich.
A cost-efficient batch sheet of separate static Uniswap biome and land scatter props.
Each cell is a different independent object, not a variant or animation frame.
These are natural biome objects for terrain richness: stones, bushes, reeds, moss, flowers, crystals, puddles, roots, fallen branches, and magical habitat details.
Avoid buildings, furniture, civic architecture, tools, signs, benches, tables, and town decorations.
Use the row and column map exactly.

Row 0 column 1: Floating Poolblossom - floating poolblossom, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake.

Row 1 column 3: Wet Clover Tuft - wet clover tuft, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake.

Row 2 column 1: Violet Bank Grass - violet bank grass, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake.

Row 2 column 3: Soft Cyan Puddle - soft cyan puddle, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake.
Row 3 column 0: Pink Current Foam - pink current foam, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake.
Row 3 column 1: Shoreline Moss Tuft - shoreline moss tuft, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake.
Row 3 column 2: Tiny Opal Fish Shadow - tiny opal fish shadow, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake.
Row 3 column 3: Lake Pearl Cluster - lake pearl cluster, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake..

Reference image 1 is a checkerboard layout guide. Use it as the exact composition template with exact sizes, all cells are square all equal size.
Preserve its 4:4 sheet ratio and its 4 columns by 4 rows of equal square cells.
The exact guide has also been saved locally at generated/object-sprites/uniswap-lake-props/object-sprite-layout-guide.png for verification.
Place exactly one frame in the center of each checkerboard cell.
Align the center of each object frame to the center of its cell.
Keep every frame fully inside its own cell, with consistent margins and no overlap into neighboring cells.
Keep the checkerboard grid visible in the final image so the generated frames can be verified against the grid.
Preserve the alternating white and gray cell backgrounds from the guide.
Draw the object frames on top of the provided checkerboard cells.

Target runtime atlas metadata: 1024x1024 logical units, arranged as 4 rows by 4 columns.
Each logical grid cell is 256x256 units. The generated image may be higher resolution, but it must keep the same 4:4 grid ratio.
Keep the object scale, anchor point, perspective, and lighting consistent across cells.
Do not crop any object. Leave enough breathing room inside each cell for animation motion.
Do not draw labels, text, numbers, watermarks, decorative borders, or UI.
Use a transparent background for every cell.

Rows, top to bottom:
Row 0: Prop Row 0 (row-0) - column 0: Paired Current Ripple - paired current ripple, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 1: Floating Poolblossom - floating poolblossom, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 2: Teal Reed Fan - teal reed fan, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 3: Pearl Sand Stone - pearl sand stone, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake
Row 1: Prop Row 1 (row-1) - column 0: Mint Pink Marker Stones - mint pink marker stones, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 1: Liquidity Lily Pad - liquidity lily pad, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 2: Small Shore Shell Cluster - small shore shell cluster, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 3: Wet Clover Tuft - wet clover tuft, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake
Row 2: Prop Row 2 (row-2) - column 0: Transparent Water Bead - transparent water bead, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 1: Violet Bank Grass - violet bank grass, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 2: Round Pool Pebble - round pool pebble, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 3: Soft Cyan Puddle - soft cyan puddle, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake
Row 3: Prop Row 3 (row-3) - column 0: Pink Current Foam - pink current foam, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 1: Shoreline Moss Tuft - shoreline moss tuft, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 2: Tiny Opal Fish Shadow - tiny opal fish shadow, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake; column 3: Lake Pearl Cluster - lake pearl cluster, natural top-down Uniswap biome prop, readable small silhouette, belongs specifically to liquidity-lake

Columns, left to right:
Column 0: slot 1.
Column 1: slot 2.
Column 2: slot 3.
Column 3: slot 4.

Column behavior:
This is a batch sheet of separate static world props, not animation frames.
Each cell must contain the specific prop named by its row and column.
Do not evolve, transform, or animate objects across columns.
Keep perspective, lighting, palette, shadow softness, and scale language consistent across all cells.
Small props may leave more transparent space inside their cell; large landmarks should still fit fully inside their cell.
Every prop must be isolated on a transparent background and usable as an independent in-world object.

Style direction:
cozy hand-painted 2D biome scatter props, three-quarter top-down view, transparent background, crisp readable silhouettes at small scale, Uniswap-inspired violet, mint, pearl, pink, cyan, and lavender-gray palette, props must feel native to liquidity-lake, soft natural edges, warm but balanced highlights, no readable text, no logos, no UI
Reference image 2 is a style reference. Use it for palette, rendering texture, edge softness, contrast, and game-art finish. Do not copy its subject unless it matches the object brief.

Return one PNG containing the full sprite sheet only.
